goals: Explore available unit conversion categories to understand tool capabilities
List available units in the length category for altitude/distance conversions
Convert an altitude measurement from feet to meters for aircraft operations
Convert a temperature value from Celsius to Fahrenheit for material specifications

user_agent_config.personality: Technical, precise, and practical. Prefers efficient workflows and accurate measurements for engineering calculations.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in aerospace engineering calculations but does not know the internal tool names or APIs. Familiar with metric and imperial units used in aviation.

end_condition: The user has completed all unit conversions needed for their aerospace engineering task and has no further questions.
